reasoning: The anchor indicates that in January 2026 the FAA announced a major reorganization creating an Advanced Aviation Technologies office to oversee integration of drones, eVTOLs/AAM, and similar technologies into the airspace. Content A matches that directly: it includes the FAA reorganization topic, the Unmanned Airspace result explicitly saying the office will oversee integration of drones and eVTOLs, and corroborating industry coverage from DRONELIFE and Inside Unmanned Systems. Although A is weak on a specific rulemaking document, it at least surfaces the FAA rulemaking page and gives enough accurate context for an LLM to answer the core query. Content B, by contrast, mostly discusses a separate 2026 pilot program for next-generation aircraft and contains several irrelevant or stale results, so it would be more likely to mislead an LLM away from the actual office/reorganization answer.
